programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor recounts the history of Winchester Cathedral, the longest medieval cathedral in northern Europe, which has witnessed civil wars, religious battles and struggled with collapsing foundations. It is the burial place of novelist Jane Austen - though only four people attended her funeral and originally her plaque made no mention of her writing. Tony learns that Winchester's bishops were among the richest, most influential and most badly behaved in the country and some were wealthier and more powerful than even England's kings

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Deep into the jungle mountains of Thailand on the border with Myanmar and far off any conventional map, Ben spends time with 40-year-old French-Canadian Julien, who has been a Buddhist monk for almost half his life. Living in a remote monastery, Ben learns how and why this former teenage student from the West stripped away all complications of a modern life for a primitive Eastern and religious existence, and how this choice affected his family. The adventurer observes how Julien has created a bespoke way of life, which includes giving back to the remote hill-tribe communities in his region

programme.title: How the Victorians Built Britain
programme.desc: Michael Buerk discovers how bold Victorian experiments and cathedrals of medicine built Britain and revolutionised the medical world. He begins in Edinburgh with murderers Burke and Hare, revealing the gruesome roots of modern anatomy and the macabre justice dolled out for those caught flaunting the system. He then travels to the operating theatre of Old St Thomas' Hospital in London for a hands-on lesson in Victorian surgery

programme.desc: Animated action adventure following a squad of six heroic puppies and their tech-savvy 10-year-old leader as they protect the community of Adventure Bay

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: Flo's fizzer gets stuck to a magnet in Luke's backpack as he is about to leave for school. Animation about three tiny aliens investigating planet Earth

programme.title: Wissper
programme.desc: Doris goes missing after falling asleep and rolling down the hill. Nobody can find her, until Mrs Turnip Pig uses her amazing sense of smell

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After her bike gets a flat tyre, Peppa and her friends have fun riding imaginary bikes and jumping in pretend muddy puddles

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Shiny wants a selfie everywhere and with every flower she sees, but it could lead to trouble

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps to restore a Victorian townhouse off the South Circular road. Owner Marie Duffy has managed to renovate the front living room, hall and a bedroom and bathroom, but does not know what to do with the rear. The architect discovers three impractical extensions that he plans to replace

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The owners of a cramped 1980s bungalow in Edenderry, Co Offaly, block Dermot Bannon's plans to demolish some walls to create a larger living space

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: In the Arctic Circle, the explorer meets Randi, the first Norwegian woman to climb Everest ahead of his own bid to scale the world's highest mountain. He embraces the tough and basic life on her 8.5 acre island by sleeping outdoors, and collecting raw building materials. Ben also experiences sea kayaking, and witnesses the northern lights

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: The model party at Nikau's house is off to a flying start, but he is feeling out of place among the beautiful strangers. Dean returns from his trip to see his son

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Leo invites Chloe to visit the vineyard he is buying. Pierce and Hendrix bond as Mr Greyson prepares to leave for Sydney

programme.title: Stalked by a Reality Star (2018)
programme.desc: A teenager lies about her age to get into a Hollywood party and meets a handsome reality TV star, only to end up rejecting his creepy advances. The celebrity refuses to take no for an answer and develops a dangerous obsession - even dating her mother in a bid to get closer to her. Thriller, starring Cynthia Preston and Emily Bader

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits by the Sea
programme.desc: John Thomson narrates the documentary following the people catering to holiday-makers in Blackpool, Skegness and Scarborough, discovering what makes the perfect seaside getaway. Lorraine and Neville race to buy an Elvis Presley stature to add to the shrine to the 1960s in their themed B&B in Skegness, while Blackpool drag venue Funny Girls searches for a new star

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Leo invites Chloe to visit the vineyard he is buying. Pierce and Hendrix bond as Mr Greyson prepares to leave for Sydney

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: The model party at Nikau's house is off to a flying start, but he is feeling out of place among the beautiful strangers. Dean returns from his trip to see his son

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: How the Victorians Built Britain
programme.desc: Michael Buerk discovers how the Victorians instituted a revolution in law and order, created the first modern police force and built the prisons Britain still relies on today. He begins in Spike Island, Co Cork, dubbed 'Ireland's Alcatraz', where he learns about the terrible conditions endured by convicts awaiting transportation to Australia, and hears the stories of those who tried to escape. Next, Michael travels to Crumlin Road Gaol in Belfast, discovering why the Victorians embarked on the biggest prison-building programme in British history - and why their efforts at prisoner rehabilitation didn't always succeed. And in Glasgow, he discovers why the city became home to the country's first recognisably modern police force

programme.title: Today at the Great Yorkshire Show
programme.desc: Anita Rani and Jules Hudson meet fourth-generation farmer Stephen Short, who has won countless prizes for his animals over the years. In 2018, his beloved sheep won the coveted prizes of Hampshire Down Male and Female Champion, but after a less successful outing in 2019, will he be able to return to his former glory this year and make his ancestors proud? Cameras also follow Emily Turner and her four-year-old son Jack as they compete for the first time with their Golden Guernsey goats Stacey and Clementine

programme.title: Lie with Me
programme.desc: Becky helps Anna set up an apartment where she is safe from Jake, and on the day Anna is due to move out and take the kids, she asks Becky to stay at home with Jake. Events then take yet another shocking turn. A couple relocate to Australia and hire a nanny who is not the innocent stranger she pretends to be. Thriller, starring Charlie Brooks and Phoebe Roberts

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Landlords Suketu and Minesha Patel signed a 'guaranteed rent' agreement with their letting agent who manages their east London property but, after falling £7,000 in rent arrears, they confront him. Letting agents Karen O'Connor and Gemma Painter in Wigan deal with a tenant whose house is in need a big clear-out. And in Darwen, Lancashire, letting agent Paul Ainsworth Lord has his work cut out for him when he's approached by a new Landlord with a big problem

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: A disparate group of young sex workers reveal what life is really like trying to make a living as escorts, cammers and sex entrepreneurs. The film explores why these young women decided to 'stop giving it away for free', revealing in the process how materialism has collided with a new age of sexual pragmatism

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Return of the documentary looking at how people buy, sell and market sex, hearing from an array of individuals working within Britain's multimillion-pound industry. In the first edition, aficionados and retailers reveal why they believe sex dolls are set to revolutionise the nation's lives

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben travels to New Zealand's North Island, where he meets a young nomadic family led by Amber and Andy, who spend their life exploring the country's wild landscapes. He hears how the family's lives changed forever after one fateful day, how they swapped the stress of the city for a life on the open road, the price they paid for chasing their dream and how the horrors of the past still haunt them today

programme.title: Never Teach Your Wife to Drive
programme.desc: Three men set out to teach their partners the rules of the road, while state-of-the-art in-car cameras record events including blazing arguments and near misses, and the drama and mayhem of the lessons puts added strain on their relationships. At 32, Kat Fleming-Scott is a late starter at driving, but her husband Chris's map-reading leaves a lot to be desired when he gets them hopelessly lost in Liverpool, while Weymouth mother-of-four Lauren Foster has lessons from her spouse Adam, who believes men are much the better drivers. Meanwhile, Nathan Phillips is a worrier and when partner Laura Whitfield becomes overconfident behind the wheel, he begins to show signs of regretting his decision to teach her

programme.title: Nick's Quest
programme.desc: Nick Baker examines the habits of the great white shark, which can grow to 20ft in length. From the safety of an underwater cage, he has an encounter with one of the creatures off the Western Cape of South Africa. He also swims with fur seals and penguins

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers advice to a Perthshire woman whose split-level bungalow in Crieff has been on the market for five years. Ann thinks too much clutter is the problem, and quickly sets to work redecorating the hallway, kitchen and lounge, before moving on to the front garden to increase its 'kerb appeal'

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas takes a film crew to a nature reserve in China to make a documentary about giant pandas, and is determined to spot one in the wild

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Animated action adventure. Mayor Goodway tries to brave the hazards of Wingnuts Dude Ranch

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: The Black Tent (1956)
programme.desc: A wounded British Army captain is saved by a tribe of nomads in the Libyan desert during the Second World War, and they take him to their camp, where he is cared for by the sheikh's daughter and falls in love with her. Romantic drama, with Anthony Steel, Anna-Maria Sandri, Donald Sinden, Andre Morell and Donald Pleasence

programme.title: The Far Country (1954)
programme.desc: A cowpoke is steering his cattle north to the Canadian border when a corrupt sheriff commandeers the herd. A local saloon-bar owner falls for the hapless cowboy, and with her help he recaptures his cattle. Hooking up with a wagon train, the couple head for the mining town of Dawson, but the thwarted and embittered sheriff is on their tail. Western, with James Stewart, Walter Brennan and Ruth Roman

programme.title: The Second Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2015)
programme.desc: With the original Best Exotic Marigold Hotel a roaring success, owner Sonny decides the time is right to expand his business empire. But to do so, he and the rest of the residents must pull out all the stops to impress a potential investor's inspector - a task that proves to be easier said than done. Comedy drama sequel, with Dev Patel, Maggie Smith, Judi Dench and Richard Gere

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Beast (2017)
programme.desc: Moll Huntingdon works as a Jersey tour guide and lives with her parents, under the strict rules of her controlling mother Hilary. One day she's saved from a sexual assault on the deserted beach by a stranger with a gun. Writer-director Michael Pearce's thriller, starring Jessie Buckley, Johnny Flynn and Geraldine James

programme.title: The Endless (2017)
programme.desc: Brothers Justin and Aaron receive a video cassette made by Camp Arcadia, a group they belonged to as children. Justin is worried that talk of 'ascension' may be a code for some future mass suicide, but Aaron convinces him to return for one day. Sci-fi horror, directed, produced by and starring Justin Benson and Aaron Moorhead

programme.title: Esther Waters (1948)
programme.desc: A kitchen maid succumbs to the advances of a caddish stable lad and falls pregnant - but is abandoned for another woman. Period drama, starring Dirk Bogarde and Kathleen Ryan

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: The Red Pony (1949)
programme.desc: A boy seeks solace from his feuding family through his friendships with his beloved pony and a ranch hand, whom he idolises. When the animal dies his relationship with his father seems to be damaged irreparably. Drama based on a short story by John Steinbeck, starring Robert Mitchum, Myrna Loy and Peter Miles

programme.title: The Rare Breed (1966)
programme.desc: An English widow decides to fulfil her cattle farmer husband's final wish of introducing the Hereford breed to America. She finds a cattleman in Texas willing to help, but first she and her daughter must transport their prize bull across the wilderness, with the aid of a sceptical ranch hand. Romantic comedy Western, starring Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart

programme.title: The Maze Runner (2014)
programme.desc: A teen arrives in an isolated community of youngsters, with no memory of who he is or the outside world. When another new arrival brings an ominous message, he realises time is running out for the group and they must find an escape route through a deadly labyrinth if they are to survive. Sci-fi adventure based on James Dashner's novel, starring Dylan O'Brien, Kaya Scodelario and Patricia Clarkson

programme.title: The Hate U Give (2018)
programme.desc: Starr Carter lives in two worlds - the poor, black neighbourhood where she resides and the mostly white prep school she attends. When she witnesses the fatal shooting of her childhood friend by a policeman, Starr must find her voice and stand up for what's right. Drama, starring Amandla Stenberg, Regina Hall and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Total Recall (2012)
programme.desc: A man living in a bleak future years after a nuclear war has fake memories of being a secret agent implanted into his brain. However, the procedure uncovers the fact that he really is a spy with his memory erased, and he is forced to become a fugitive from the totalitarian government. Sci-fi thriller remake, with Colin Farrell, Kate Beckinsale and Jessica Biel

programme.title: Goat (2016)
programme.desc: New college student Brad is desperate to fit into his new surroundings, so taking a cue from his older brother, he decides to pledge a fraternity. All goes well at first as he attends parties and meets several girls, but as he enters into the final stretch of the pledging ritual-known as hell week, Brad finds things taking a violent turn as he has to endure a series of brutal initiation rituals. Fact-based drama, with Ben Schnetzer and Nick Jonas

programme.title: Timberjack (1954)
programme.desc: A man forced to return to his Montana home to take over the family lumber business sets out to discover the reasons behind his father's death, while engaging in a fierce professional and romantic rivalry with a neighbouring forester. Western drama, starring Sterling Hayden, David Brian, Vera Ralston and Hoagy Carmichael

programme.title: The Furies (1950)
programme.desc: The daughter of a ruthlessly ambitious cattle baron is divided between her love for one of his enemies and the prospect of taking over the family ranch when he dies. But when the cruel rancher has one of her friends hanged, she begins plotting his downfall. Western from director Anthony Mann, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Walter Huston

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles (1959)
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson are asked to protect the last remaining member of the aristocratic Baskerville family, who is believed to be the target of a monstrous spectral hound roaming the remote Devon moors. Hammer version of Arthur Conan Doyle's mystery, starring Peter Cushing, Andre Morrell, Christopher Lee, John Le Mesurier and Miles Malleson

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern

programme.title: The Imitation Game (2014)
programme.desc: Biopic of mathematician Alan Turing, whose work during the Second World War translated seemingly unbreakable Nazi codes as well as pioneering the development of computer technology. In the years following the war, his life would be destroyed as his homosexuality was discovered, leaving him facing criminal charges. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley and Charles Dance

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout (2018)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team join forces with CIA assassin August Walker to prevent a disaster caused by mysterious arms dealer John Lark and a group of terrorists known as the Apostles. However, Hunt and his colleagues are soon pushed to their limits thanks to a face from their past. Writer/director Christopher McQuarrie's sixth entry in the action thriller saga, starring Tom Cruise and Henry Cavill

programme.title: Prospect (2018)
programme.desc: A teenager and her father travel to a remote alien moon aiming to strike it rich, but there are others roving the wilderness and the job quickly devolves into a fight to survive. Sci-fi thriller, starring Sophie Thatcher, Jay Duplass and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Fire Will Come (2019)
programme.desc: A man returns home to his aging mother after serving a prison sentence for arson. Along the way, he tries to adapt to daily farm life and cope with the villagers' memories of his past actions. Crime drama, starring Amador Arias, Benedicta Sánchez and Inazio Abrao. In Galician and Spanish

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chef's attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney decides he needs a little more excitement in his life, so Ted agrees to join him on a trip to Philadelphia. However, their big night out culminates in a brush with the law. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted finds a shirt he has not worn in years, which brings back memories and gives him a new perspective in his search for love. Barney bribes Robin to say something shocking during a news bulletin - but the prank backfires. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe are shocked to discover that Lennox's boyfriend Aidan spent the night in her bedroom, but Joe is even more taken aback at Mel's easy-going reaction to the situation. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Holly declares that it is time for him to start shaving

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe starts to run Mel's finances, he becomes convinced that her credit card statement reveals that she is having an affair with a married man. Meanwhile, Lennox tries to get along with her friend's new date - until he reveals that he has a crush on her and Ryder tries to decide what to get Holly for her birthday

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley makes a bet with Ben that he cannot get a second date with Heather, but when she fails to jump at the chance to go out with him again, Ben resorts to desperate measures to win the wager. Bonnie meets a handsome stranger and considers ending her relationship with Brad. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Chelsea Kane

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker acts like a lawyer in front of his father because he has forgotten to tell him he has dropped out of law school and works in TV. Meanwhile, Riley has a crush on a British guy, but Bonnie mistakenly thinks she has fallen for Danny. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry takes inspiration from Lionel Richie and sets about creating a sculpture of Lainey as the ultimate Valentine's Day gift. Murray advises Adam to defy his mother and sneak into a screening of the restricted-rated film Porky's, and Geoff agrees to be just good friends with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's plan to reignite his fading relationship with Dana by taking her to a 'Weird Al' Yankovic concert backfires. When Barry and Erica become peer counsellors at school, they worry that Murray may be feeling depressed. 'Weird Al' Yankovic and Tim Meadows guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's honeymoon runs aground in New York, Penny and Leonard discover that they are uncomfortably similar to Amy's parents, while Raj insults astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and starts a war on social media. Kathy Bates and Teller (of Penn and Teller fame) guest star as Amy's parents

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy drive themselves to distraction trying to figure out what the 'perfect gift' is that Leonard and Penny have got them for their wedding. Meanwhile, Raj decides he wants to settle down and asks his father to arrange a marriage for him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries about being 'hazed' by the older students when he goes to high school, but he soon earns their respect by body-slamming Barry. Erica and her friends talk about what they are going to put into their school-time capsule

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. Beverly gets her teaching certificate and aims to work as a substitute teacher at her children's school, but things go awry and the kids end up in a Saturday detention. But after Murray pays a visit to the school, everyone learns an important lesson. Tim Meadows and Allie Grant guest star

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is thrown off when Pops shows up to the house full of festive cheer. The whole family gets into the holiday spirit, until someone from Lynette's past shows up

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Bow takes Diane to a salon and wants to spend this time together as a bonding opportunity. Diane is conflicted about her hair

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: As the wedding of Gina's mother and Boyle's father arrives, each member of the squad is given a task to complete for the big day. However, Peralta and Santiago get sidetracked chasing a criminal, and Jeffords struggles to officiate at the ceremony. Comedy, guest starring Sandra Bernhard and Nick Cannon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes jealous when Amy gets attention in the media, Raj spots Anu talking to her ex-boyfriend, and Stuart is intimidated by the idea of moving in with Denise, all of which cause mayhem when Penny and Leonard organise a paintball game

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's former boyfriend Zack and his wife encounter fertility problems when wanting a baby, so ask Leonard for his help. Raj attempts to patch things up with his estranged fiancee Anu

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Jorgie Porter continues her look back at the soap's classic weddings. Mercedes has fallen head over heels for Dr Browning, unaware that he killed her nurse friend Lynsey

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: After surviving their first charter, the crew heads out when one crew member's shocking revelation leaves a lasting impression

programme.title: Atomic Blonde (2017)
programme.desc: MI6 operative Lorraine Broughton is sent to Berlin before the fall of the wall to investigate the murder of a fellow spy and recover a missing list of double agents. The city is in a dangerously unstable state, and she finds herself targetted by multiple factions plotting to exploit the uncertain future for their own ruthless ends. Thriller, starring Charlize Theron, James McAvoy and John Goodman

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides two more singletons on the dating show based naked attraction alone. First into the studio is 26-year-old Adele from Scotland. After beating cancer, Adele wants to live life to the full and find a guy who feels the same. She is followed by 22-year-old Jack from Manchester. After a dramatic four-stone weight-loss, Jack wants to show off his new body and attract the one for him

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The amateur critics share their opinions on TV from February 2017, including The Jump, Dragons' Den, Death in Paradise, Jon Richardson: How to Survive the End of the World, SS-GB and the news. Craig Cash narrates

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reformed teen rebel and unlikely baker Sunny, 33, is partnered with Misha, but is a cupcake enough to spark a romance between these two self-professed boffins? In a first for the show, 22-year-old twins nervously embark on a double date, with die-hard Cher fan Stephen meeting legal assistant Emily, while his sister Rebecca sits down with engineer Kristian. Plus, there is a special guest at the First Dates restaurant as maitre d' Fred's father visits from France. And naturally, he has a way with the ladies

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Jerry gets everyone to ditch their mobile phones and tablets so that the family can really bond when his parents pay a holiday visit and bring along a new friend. Meanwhile, Rick builds a tiny amusement park inside the body of his homeless friend Ruben, but when problems arise he must shrink Morty down and inject him into the site in an attempt to save Ruben's life. Special Christmas episode guest starring Dana Carvey and John Oliver

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo try to get to the bottom of a twisted mystery when aliens transport them into a familiar but alternate reality created in a huge simulation chamber on board their spaceship. An oblivious Jerry is accidentally included in the experiment but fails to notice the subtle changes in his surroundings as he makes a big advertising pitch at work. An episode inspired by the twist-filled films of M Night Shyamalan, guest starring David Cross (Arrested Development)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The amateur critics share their opinions on TV from February 2017, including The Jump, Dragons' Den, Death in Paradise, Jon Richardson: How to Survive the End of the World, SS-GB and the news. Craig Cash narrates

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily and Marshall decide to participate in more grown-up activities as their wedding approaches, and organise a cheese and wine evening. Meanwhile, Ted, Barney and Robin check out the dubious delights of the club scene. US comedy, starring Josh Radnor

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The friends prepare for their annual Halloween party - which for Ted means another fruitless search for the girl he met at the event several years earlier, but has never seen since. Marshall and Lily enter a costume competition, and Robin introduces everyone to her new boyfriend, Mike

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Mel punches a man who picks on Ryder at the cinema, a clip of the fracas is posted online and she becomes known as 'Battling Burke', much to the delight of her political campaign manager. Meanwhile, Lennox befriends a new girl at school, but she soon takes advantage of his kindness. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel wants to break up with her boyfriend Donald, but she feels guilty because he has just been fired from his job - so she asks Joe to help boost Donald's confidence before she dumps him. Meanwhile, Holly confides a secret to Lennox, and asks her to keep it from Ryder

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a master craftsman whose dream is to build a castle in rural Devon made entirely of mud. Kevin McCabe plans to form the huge property out of two vast curved roundhouses - the largest of which is inspired by the natural geometry of a snail shell - connected by glazing and topped with wildflower meadow roofs to mirror the surrounding countryside. However, the project involves mixing and laying a mind-boggling 2,000 tons of cob, all during warm, sunny weather - and the sheer scale of the task soon becomes clear

Plus, tensions rise between Mike and Tash at dinner, and harsh comments at feedback lead the hosts to suspect game playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport, Hampshire, run by publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne. Karen Hepker is disappointed with the honeymoon suite, while Clive and Jenny Aylett find a dubious looking splash guard in the shower. A boat tour backfires when Jenny struggles with her water phobia and at dinner Karen takes the opportunity to tell the others exactly what she thinks of them. But things really kick off when it comes to feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wharfe House hosts Pauline Cox and Claire Smith begin a bitter debate, demanding to know why their beds caused such a sleepless night. Accusations subsequently fly in all directions and walk-outs look on the cards as tensions mount leading to the payments being revealed

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Heritage building enthusiasts Ted and Ita Daniels create an ultra-modern rooftop apartment in Dunedin, on one of the city's most beautiful renovations

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Senior neurologist Dr Colin Driver comes up with an unconventional solution to treat a nurse's cat, which has been rushed into the surgery after being poisoned. The owners of a rare Polish sheepdog with a failed fracture repair on a broken leg are faced with the option of having the leg removed, or trying an innovative total elbow replacement. Plus, a self-confessed 'crazy cat lady' brings in a ginger tom which urgently needs leg surgery

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As autumn sets in, Dick and Angel harvest their pumpkins in the walled garden and organise a family wheelbarrow race. The basement is the latest room to be transformed, serving as a nerve centre for the whole chateau, a space for storing deliveries, and Dick's workshop. The old piggery is also renovated, in anticipation of some new arrivals

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Michael Butcher and Phil Palmer want to bring a touch of urban glamour to their new home at Christmas Farm near Newbury, Berkshire, by creating a modern farmhouse that combines an open-plan party pad with functional spaces below. As the builders set to work on the handcrafted flint exterior, complete with a vast trapezoid window, the pair juggle construction with farming the land, and in an attempt to make the project work financially, they set up a microbrewery in the barn. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews race to mountain emergencies in the Lake District, as a walker goes into cardiac arrest on the banks of Ullswater and a biker is injured on a remote road

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital in London face a busy day dealing with brain injuries, including 65-year-old cabbie Charlie Brown, whom doctors worry has suffered a haemorrhage in a car accident, and 89-year-old Peggy Pierce, who has been rushed in following a suspected stroke. In the waiting room, a woman is comforted by her ex-boyfriend while she awaits treatment for a cut finger

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A 71-year-old man is left with a severely broken ankle when he is knocked off his bike by a dog. Paramedic Sam Grimson and student paramedic Ayaz Ali are sent to a park in Birmingham to help. Then they respond to a call to assist a man who's been trapped for over 20 hours with a broken leg

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews race to mountain emergencies in the Lake District, as a walker goes into cardiac arrest on the banks of Ullswater and a biker is injured on a remote road

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

In the waiting room, a woman is comforted by her ex-boyfriend while she awaits treatment for a cut finger

Paramedic Sam Grimson and student paramedic Ayaz Ali are sent to a park in Birmingham to help. Then they respond to a call to assist a man who's been trapped for over 20 hours with a broken leg

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty finds out about a threat to British juniper berries that could spell the end of gin's recent resurgence, while Kate Quilton heads to Hawaii to find out why macadamia nuts are not sold in their shells. Matt Tebbutt investigates the possible health risks caused by his habit of going back for a second dip in a communal salsa with a tortilla chip that's already been in his mouth

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is taught how to bind books by expert Isabelle Ting, and reveals how to create a notebook from leftover materials including leather offcuts, recycled leather coats and decorative paper

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate detective team searches for an heir to the estate of a woman who led a glamorous life of international travel and adventure. There is the story of an East End couple who chose to raise their disabled daughter at a time when it was against conventional wisdom, plus details of unclaimed estates still awaiting heirs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Surrey and Middlesex. Henry restores a pair of racing go-karts to race against restorer Guy, and Simon repurposes an old butcher's block into a coffee table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Eastbourne on the south coast to restore a 1962 Mini Cooper. This particular model is the property of farmer Keith, who has raced and rallied cars for most of his life, until being struck down with serious heart problems. Although his racing days are now over, Keith cannot let go of his beloved Mini, even though it has been rotting away in a shed for years

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A mountain biker has a bad fall in a remote part of a forest, a four-year-old needs strong pain relief when he breaks his thigh bone, and a farmer fractures a replacement hip

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at North Bridge Street B&B in Hawick in the Scottish Borders, which is run by Eileen Walsh and her Portuguese partner Emanuel Forte. When the guests arrive, the purple-themed rooms cause a reaction, while one competitor's constant criticising irritates another

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at the Golden Fleece in Ruleholme, Cumbria, run by chef Robert Cowan and his partner, Sylvia Spark. Before long, guests Eileen and Emmanuel pick up on cleanliness issues, and breakfast proves to be a disappointment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Bubble Inn in Stenson, Derbyshire for the third day of the competition, where unsightly stains and security leave some of them less than impressed. Manager and ex-semi-professional boxer Connie Eleftheriou is keen to take his rivals in the ring with him, however the real damage happens when Emmanuel is taken to hospital after some overenthusiastic dancing at a Greek-themed night

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Melinda Beckett-Hughes is the final host of the week at Ayuda House in Greater Manchester - and as she has spent the week picking fault, the guests expect perfection from her. However, Robert and Sylvia are shocked to find a dirty towel in a drawer, while Emmanuel and Eileen cannot believe the levels of dust and Connie is horrified by the carpet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some old scores. Eileen and Emmanuel from North Bridge Street want to get to the bottom of Melinda and Stewart's dirty bin comments as well as challenging Melinda's shower issues. Robert and Sylvia from the Golden Fleece try to defend their breakfast disaster, but also pull Eileen and Emmanuel up on their low score

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Aaron and Christine Green create an unconventional, curvaceous creation in Cass Bay, Christchurch, that is as much of an artwork as it is a house

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Staffordshire bull terrier requires attention when it suffers complete paralysis in its back legs, and a Devon rex cat is brought in after being struck by a car. Its eight-year-old owner faces a tough decision when X-rays reveal a severely broken pelvis and a ruptured bladder. Plus, a young cavalier king has had seven operations in a bid to fix its knee joint, and Noel tries to resolve the problem

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: A look back at the transformation of Dick and Angel's 45-room chateau in France from abandoned ruin to sumptuous family home. The series begins by recalling the technical and engineering challenges they had to overcome to make it habitable for their young family. The couple remember their first winter together, when Dick's ingenious solutions were put to the test

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: In 2003 Gil and Hillary Briffa decided to retire to southern Spain, where they planned to build a contemporary home in the Andalusian hills against the backdrop of more traditional properties. A few years later, Gil died, but now Kevin McCloud revisits Hillary to find out whether her residence has settled into its landscape and how life is treating her as a British widow living abroad

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: Documentary catching up with London's Crossrail engineers less than two years after the project's excavations uncovered the 14th-century Charterhouse plague pit. In an extraordinary turn of events, further work on the Liverpool Street station has revealed another burial ground, this time accommodating the capital's radicals, rebels and outsiders. The Bedlam burial ground, which is thought to be the final resting place of nearly 20,000 people, was believed to be lost for around 300 years. Now, with the excavation process under way, archaeologists and historians have been using bone analysis techniques in conjunction with parish records to reveal the names and life stories of those whose remains were found on-site. Their research reveals that people came from as far afield as Africa to work in the English capital, and sheds light on how pollution first became one of the city's most prolific killers

programme.title: World's Greatest Shipwrecks: History Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: The matter of toxic wrecks around the world from the Second World War, as 80 years later vessels are disintegrating and spilling their toxic loads out into the open sea. A sunken oil tanker with a paper-thin hull is on the verge of creating a huge oil slick contaminating Scandinavian beaches, while in the Thames Estuary, an American ammunition ship is a ticking time bomb

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients dealt with at King's College Hospital, London include a man who was stabbed in his own home and has injuries to his lung, arm and liver, and an elderly woman injured in a fall. A former international lawyer who lost his wife, family and home to alcoholism decides to make a change after being treated with care and compassion

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Victoria Coren Mitchell take on Jon Richardson and James Acaster, while Morgana Robinson joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Secret History

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt visits China to find out how they maximise the chances of finding pearls, and helps to cultivate them from a surprising creature that is definitely not an oyster. Meanwhile, Kate Quilton investigates whether it is safe to eat sliced ham that has developed a weird rainbow pattern, and discovers a bizarre connection between the meat and butterflies

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: As Mike and Frank continue their pick through Alabama, Danielle finds them a collector with a shocking stash of high voltage oddities

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Vigilant Customs and Border Protection officers uncover 5,000 rounds of ammunition being smuggled across Hidalgo Bridge into Mexico

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness introduces Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff to his latest creation - an all-electric, all-terrain ice-cream van for the 21st century. Elsewhere, the team tests the battery-powered Honda E, Vauxhall Corsa-e and Mini Electric with a race around a deserted Alton Towers

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take three lightweight supercars across Europe in search of the continent's best roads, and Jeremy looks at Volkswagen's decision to put a Bentley engine in the Golf. Helen Mirren is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef continues his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures, travelling to Penang, Malaysia, to sample its multifaceted cuisine, which includes Malay, Indian, Chinese and British flavours. He also meets food writer Fay Khoo to explore the popularity of the region's fish-head curry, before crossing the Indian Ocean to Sri Lanka, where he visits a bustling fishing village and takes part in an unusual expedition

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May revisit their bid to build amphibious vehicles, and face one of their toughest challenges yet. The Audi R8 takes to the track and Jools Holland tests his driving ability as the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets to grips with a Peel P50, the smallest car to go into production, and finds a surprising number of uses for it. James May experiences the luxury of the Rolls-Royce Phantom Drophead Coupe convertible, and the Stig puts the Ferrari 599 GTB Fiorano through its paces on the test track. The Rolling Stones' Ronnie Wood is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry is joined by comedians Dara O Briain, Chris Addison, Sean Lock and regular panellist Alan Davies on the quiz with a difference. The host asks questions about things that are horrible, awarding points for the answers he finds the most interesting

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by TV and radio presenter Alice Levine for a packed two-day break in the Estonian capital Tallinn. The pair head to the top of the country's tallest building, while Alice gives a masterclass in TV presenting, and they walk through a thousand years of Estonian history - including peeping Toms and a cold-war cocktail. They also visit an old KGB outpost, try the sport of kick sledging and sample some new Baltic cuisine, before boarding a submarine for an end-of-trip recap

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Bob Mortimer for a weekend away in in the German city. On arrival in the warehouse district, they check in to a nautical-themed hotel before hitting the Elbphilharmonie - from which they get a 360-degree view of the city below. Richard and Bob join a Beatles tour around the red-light district before sampling hipster cocktails at the Drip Bar, while also finding time to take in cruising, art deco, E numbers, emulsifiers, thickeners, and a beach bar overlooking the shipyards

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the quiz with a difference, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers she finds most interesting. programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: Rhod thinks he has a great chance of becoming a model - after all, he was voted Wales' 14th sexiest man. However, his dreams of strutting along catwalks in Milan and Paris are shattered by unimpressed fashion guru Julien Macdonald, so he has to lower his expectations somewhat, taking him into parts of the industry he never knew existed. He strips off for a room full of budding artists, meets a woman whose hands are her fortune, and signs up with an agency that focuses on 'character' rather than good looks. Can he make it or must he face the brutal truth?

programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with the offbeat tourism show. In the first edition, he is joined by Stephen Merchant to enjoy a weekend break in the Croatian city of Dubrovnik. Having checked in to their fancy rooms at a 16th-century townhouse, they head off round one of the world's best-preserved medieval cities. A Game of Thrones tour features some of the show's most celebrated locations, while Richard and Stephen also visit a hilltop fort still littered with landmines dating from the war of the 1990s

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Joe Wilkinson for a two-day break in Poland's second city Krakow, beginning by attending a baking workshop, before heading to a salt mine to marvel at the world's largest underground chapel. They also drive to Nowa Huta, a showcase suburb of socialist realism, where they end up in an authentic communist-era apartment - with obligatory vodka and pickles. After a lunch of pierogi dumplings, they take part in a stained glass workshop at the centre of Krakow's art nouveau movement

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson test-drives two estate cars - the BMW M5 and Mercedes E63. Richard Hammond tries out motor-home racing, while James May pits an Alfa Romeo 159 against a man who crosses the Humber estuary without using its famous bridge. The Stig puts Honda's Civic Type R through its paces and former England rugby union forward Lawrence Dallaglio is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In an edition first broadcast in 2007, Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May celebrate British Leyland's 40th birthday by trying to boost the reputation of the cars that once rolled off its production line. The Aston Martin DBS is put through its paces on the test track, Jennifer Saunders is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car and the team asks whatever happened to the beach buggy

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Dev Griffin, Alex Horne, Debbie McGee and June Sarpong test their knowledge in a series of trivia-based games across the week, with the ultimate winner declared on Friday

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell feature in a special episode of out-takes, looking back over some of the best moments. Among the celebrity guests are Kevin Bishop, Warwick Davis, Romesh Ranganathan, Hugh Dennis, Sara Cox and Brian Blessed

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry is joined by guests Bill Bailey, Eddie Izzard, Danny Baker and regular panellist Alan Davies on the quiz with a difference. programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Lou Sanders for a two-day break in the Norwegian city of Bergen, taking a speedboat transfer from the airport to their waterfront lodgings. They explore the historic neighbourhood of Bryggen, ride a cable car to the top of Mt Ulriken and fly down the fastest zipline in Norway - against Richard's better judgement

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Ellie Taylor head to the Spanish capital for a two-day break, following an itinerary rich in art, history, histrionics and ham. The pair go on a guided tour in which they view masterpieces by Bosch, Velasquez, Picasso and Dali, before they attend a ham-carving workshop and a sample a five-course tasting menu, of which four courses are pork or ham, including a tartare dish. They also take in a lively boating lake, a circus church and a grisly tour of the Spanish Inquisition

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Doc Martin star Martin Clunes hosts an extended edition of the satirical quiz from October 2019, with Layla Moran and Sara Pascoe joining regular team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at that week's events

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks to Dave Gorman, Al Murray, Rob Beckett, Sara Pascoe and Paul Chowdhry, including a challenge involving an egg cup

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: The comedian undertakes a work placement at the Welsh Mountain Zoo near Colwyn Bay, Conwy, where his tasks include looking after tigers, sea lions and monkeys. However, Rhod struggles to remember the exotic creatures' names, let alone how to take care of them

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: The comedian is joined by fellow funnyman Ed Gamble. After a pulled pork sandwich with a difference, Nick gets competitive and they are taught how to make sushi at Nippon kitchen

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: Incredible feats of human endeavour, revealing what people have built, where they've built it, how and why. The first edition explores deep inside the rock on Gibraltar where there's over 55km complex of tunnels, under London, where 21st-century engineering innovation is paving the way for the ultimate super sewer and continues the legacy of Victorian pioneers and reveals the extraordinary subterranean space of one of Europe's largest and most breath-taking natural cave systems - The Postojna Cave in Slovenia

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: A look at Sweden's passion for subterranean spaces and how this nation has taken extraordinary precautions to protect itself - by excavating an astounding 65,000 nuclear bunkers. In south-west England, deep in the Mendip Hills of Somerset, lies one of the most spectacular landscapes in the UK, but beneath this breath-taking landscape sits secret caverns and magical rock formations carved out by nature. Plus, how in Romania, nside a 1.2km-thick layer of salt, sits a world underground first

programme.title: Royal Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The mysterious death of the Duke of Kent in a 1942 plane crash, which has led to accusations of the Royal family erasing him from history

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo discovers the importance of Cardiff's Victorian coal heritage to the city's development. He also finds out why Barry Island has been attached to the mainland since the 19th century, and takes a steam ride through the Brecon Beacons National Park

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo ends his journey through the west of England and south Wales by exploring the connection between the Victorian railway and Port Talbot's steelworks. He then follows the trail of 19th-century waterfall hunters in Neath, and reveals Milford Haven's whaling past

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Erddig in North Wales. Items brought in to be valued include a mourning ring with a connection to Charlotte Bronte, a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations, a jade figurine from the Summer Palace in Beijing, and an 18th-century wine bottle which has links to a Scottish artist

programme.title: Trains That Changed the World
programme.desc: The historical importance of freight trains, including four-mile long vehicles transporting enough iron ore to build two Eiffel towers

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970 Excalibur Roadstar, once owned by Roy Orbison, arrives at Thornton-le-Dale and Derek heads to County Durham to collect a 1935 Austin 7 Ulster

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, scorched remains that speak of imprisonment and torture and vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Warship

programme.title: Combat Dealers

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers
programme.desc: Drew asks Michael and Maria to revamp a ventriloquist doll that's over 100 years old. Lighting expert Jolene is tasked with reviving a dusty chandelier

programme.title: Restoration Home

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they build a tractor every three minutes to power Indian agriculture? How do they cast the bronze bells that help Swiss farmers keep track of their cows?

programme.title: How It's Made

programme.title: How It's Made

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Radio expert Mark Stuckey has a job on his hands, repairing a 1930s transistor radio brought into the Repair Shop by David Hill from Brecon. The radio was given to David's father by an army officer on the beaches at Dunkirk during the Second World War, and after being successfully shepherded through the bullets and the crashing waves to safety, it became the Hill family's pride and joy. However, the subsequent years have not been kind, with the vintage transistor battered and broken both inside and out. A battered leather gaming case and a grandfather clock with a poignant history are also given a new lease of life

programme.title: American Chopper

programme.title: Fantomworks

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders

programme.title: How It's Made

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Birmingham couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Amanda and her husband Anthony kick off the competition with an ambitious menu, before it's the turn of festival lover Oli and his girlfriend LC, who prepare a vegetarian menu for their guests. However, their evening is tainted by Anthony, who upsets several of the guests with an untoward remark. Civil partners Steve and Sean try to put the week's tension behind them as they focus on winning the cash prize

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Karl and Naomh, who first met at university, love the relaxed lifestyle of Menorca and want to be near the beautiful beaches of its south-east coast where they held their wedding. With Scarlette Douglas on hand and a top cash budget of £230,000, they are looking for a place with plenty of outside space for themselves and their two dogs

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Duncan and Theresa Murray from Bedfordshire fell in love with the Mijas area of Spain's Costa del Sol ten years ago when Duncan's father had a holiday home there. Now, they're determined to follow in his footsteps and buy one for themselves. They're looking for a place that they can also let out to holidaymakers when they're not using it, so Jonnie Irwin shows them five properties for their £120,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Manjit and Cathy Jandu have recently retired from their medical practice and are ready for a new environment. Inspired by their son who lived in Madrid for a year, they've decided Spain is for them and are determined to buy a villa around Estepona on the Costa del Sol. With £300,000 to find the perfect property, Jonnie Irwin sets out to locate and show them five homes to choose between

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time model and writer Azzi Kalili hosts the first dinner party in west London. She erects a Moroccan marquee in her garden, but seems oblivious to her freezing guests and their dislike of her food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Plumber Steve Capel hosts the second party in west London, putting together his favourite dish, a roulade of ostrich, kudu and springbok. However, his plans to entertain the other diners with a demonstration of his nunchuk skills are cut abruptly short when an injury sustained in the kitchen comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ex-wedding planner and self-confessed perfectionist Zae Greenwood hosts the third dinner party in west London. He tries to impress his guests with a wedding-style menu, but they do not respond well to his culinary efforts

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Events organiser Emma Boardman Magliocchetti hosts the penultimate dinner party in west London. She hopes to prove to her new Italian husband that she can be the perfect wife and create an incredible feast, despite never having cooked a three-course meal before

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jane Welch hosts the final dinner party in west London, and has asked her guests to appear in fancy dress. The busy mother is initially nervous about the evening and her adventurous menu, but becomes emotional when her diners compliment the meal. Plus, the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Portugal, holiday village owners rush to get ready in time for their very first guests, while a motorhome rental business in France encounters some technical difficulties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps house hunters Sue and Ray search for a retirement home on the Spanish island of Lanzarote, showing them five properties for their budget of £130,000

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part two of two. Sheila Hancock and Gyles Brandreth explore the Staffordshire and Worcestershire Canal. They uncover the history of Stourport, which only came into being after the canal was built there, which is unique for a British town. They explore the history of carpet manufacturing in Kidderminster and meet 84-year-old Audrey, who operated a daunting power loom for much of her working life. Gyles also dons a panto costume in Stourbridge to learn more about the local legend of Dick Whittington. When the duo reach Wolverhampton, they get a taste of the Desi pub, a modern institution in the Black Country that combines Punjabi food with British booze

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: The final episode of the series pays a visit to the Isles of Scilly, meeting the owners of a vineyard who are planning to retire as they show their successors the ropes. On the mainland in Cornwall, there's an ambitious project underway to build the world's largest labyrinth. Plus, the danger posed by abandoned fishing nets

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Denise Van Outen and Eddie Boxshall, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth and Maureen Lipman, and Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr assess the week's biggest news stories, hard-hitting documentaries, laughable comedies and gritty dramas

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Denise Van Outen and Eddie Boxshall, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth and Maureen Lipman, and Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr assess the week's biggest news stories, hard-hitting documentaries, laughable comedies and gritty dramas

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted
programme.desc: The celebrated TV chef journeys to some of the most incredible and remote locations on Earth in search of culinary inspiration, epic adventures, and cultural experiences he will never forget. In the inaugural episode, he travels by motorcycle to the Sacred Valley of the Incas in Peru to learn the secrets of high-altitude cooking. As part of his quest, he fishes in high-altitude lakes, and samples fried worms, rare multi-coloured potatoes, and guinea pig

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Police officers in Northamptonshire respond to an ever increasing number of 999 calls concerning people living in shared accommodation. The number of houses of multiple occupancy (HMO) has nearly trebled since 2013. PC Sean Whelan is dispatched to one HMO to deal with a fight in the shared kitchen. He also has to mediate between a householder who hasn't been paid the rent he's owed and a tenant with no contract in place. PC Debbie Wishart attends a hostel where she arrests a woman suspected of stealing a chicken Kiev, while PC Sam Clulow attends a call involving a vulnerable heroin user who's being preyed upon

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Nathan and Amye as they build a giant cathedral-like property modelled on Dutch barn-style houses, but with a contemporary twist. It is a hugely ambitious plan, and with Nathan project managing and setting themselves just a year to finish the build, the pressure to pull it off is huge

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The patisserie chefs face the quarter-final, and for their first challenge they serve up 24 Black Forest gateaux and 24 mini roulades. For the showpiece, the teams go back to the 1970s as they construct a disco-inspired showpiece, using a combination of sugar and chocolate, and incorporating desserts. Presented by Tom Allen and Liam Charles

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary looking back at some of some of Noel Fitzpatrick's most memorable cases and catching up with the animals at the heart of the stories. Up first are puppies, including four-month-old West Highland terrier Rodney, who had been born without back feet, bulldog puppy Chica, who required urgent surgery to repair a serious elbow fracture, and Rottweiler puppy Elvis, who was given a unique spinal implant developed by Noel

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Brendan sends the tourists parasailing in Lanzarote, before an afternoon activity forces the more masculine of the group to get in touch with their feminine side

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants head to Trevarrian Lodge in Newquay, Cornwall, where Jean Hegarty and her husband - professional chef Dec - are hoping the food will win their guests over

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Birmingham compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Helen and her husband Lorne, who aim to channel their 24 years together into a safe, solid menu. However, lovebirds Ciaran and Anita criticise the food for lacking passion, and try to spice things up. Meanwhile, Rob is so entranced by his Lithuanian wife Egle that he regularly feels the need to pinch himself whenever he looks at her

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Teresa Lynch search for a property in the western Algarve, Portugal. With dramatically falling house prices, she hopes her budget of £120,000 will be enough to fulfil her lifelong dream of living on the country's coast

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps house hunter Bruce Marsden and his daughter Amy Davis. Affter 40 years working as a vet, Bruce wants a holiday home for his whole family in the Chania area of Crete

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton shows retired couple Angela and Bernie Ward five properties in Cyprus, hoping that on a budget of £185,000, one of them will prove to be their dream home

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marketing manager Stephanie Hale hosts the first party in Nottingham, where her guests are local councillor Alex Foster, beauty therapist Janice Overton, project engineer Brian Hodges and businessman Barry Dickman. She encounters problems when one of the diners takes a dislike to her prawns, while another has trouble identifying an artichoke

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Local councillor Alex Foster throws the second party in Nottingham, hoping to impress with his French menu and a spot of bell-ringing for entertainment. However, one guest likens the host's starter to cat food, while another criticises his home's tidiness

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty therapist Janice Overton hosts a 1970s-themed dinner party in Nottingham. The guests seem to be in the mood when they arrive suitably dressed for the occasion, but they soon begin to feel uncomfortable as one of them reveals that he is not keen on a fellow diner

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engineer Brian Hodges hosts the penultimate dinner party in Nottingham. Knowing his skills are limited, he decides to rope in his local butcher to help out in the kitchen, borrows cutlery from a pub and persuades a friend's daughters to waitress for him

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party animal Barry Dickman hosts the final dinner party in Nottingham, hoping his Greek-themed night will be enough for him to win the competition. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple of bike lovers launch a new cycling business in Spain, while in France, a motorhome rental business deals with a busy day of bookings

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall

On the mainland in Cornwall, there's an ambitious project underway to build the world's largest labyrinth. Plus, the danger posed by abandoned fishing nets

Director Chad Stahelski's action thriller sequel, starring Keanu Reeves, Halle Berry and Ian McShane

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman with brittle bone disease who is in agony after a fall - only to find themselves with two patients on their hands as her daughter collapses in front of them. A young man whose blood sugar levels are so high is in danger of slipping into a diabetic coma, while a middle-aged man with a history of heart problems refuses to go to hospital

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Police officers in Northamptonshire respond to an ever increasing number of 999 calls concerning people living in shared accommodation. The number of houses of multiple occupancy (HMO) has nearly trebled since 2013. PC Sean Whelan is dispatched to one HMO to deal with a fight in the shared kitchen. He also has to mediate between a householder who hasn't been paid the rent he's owed and a tenant with no contract in place. PC Debbie Wishart attends a hostel where she arrests a woman suspected of stealing a chicken Kiev, while PC Sam Clulow attends a call involving a vulnerable heroin user who's being preyed upon

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at some of their favourite properties from the show. They begin in Cullercoats, on North Tyneside, where Mark and Suze Drummond have emotional ties to their Victorian townhouse - special memories that are making it difficult for Suzie to consider leaving. In Rushden, Northamptonshire, Susan and John Antoniou-Bailey are torn over their unique five-bedroom home. Susan loves its history and original features, but John has had enough of constantly moving between the disjointed, boxy rooms

programme.title: A Lake District Farm Shop
programme.desc: Documentary following a family-run shop in the Lake District and the local people who produce its goods. The first episode features a ramen chef who hopes the shop's managers will stock his new recipe.
