programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Rivendell Outdoor Club, a clothing-optional resort in Wimborne, Dorset, managed by couple Kerry Murphy and Andy Gautry. On arrival not all the contestants are happy to let it all hang out but a warm welcome from the hosts soon puts them all at ease

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three sets of contestants from Brighton compete, beginning with Sam and Nick, who produce a simple menu that reflects their busy lives running two businesses and looking after four children. The second couple are Maria and Terry, who offer an Asian-themed meal and an evening's entertainment of writing love poems. Last to host are Dave and his perfectionist girlfriend Sarah, who try to provide a fun-fuelled night full of quality ingredients

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Bev have been married for a decade and now wish to realise their dream of relocating to Torrevieja, Spain. With a maximum budget of £100,000 and a long list of family and friends ready to come out and visit, this extremely sociable pair want a property with enough space for guests as well as a music room for musician Paul. Jean Johansson sets out to help find them an appropriate property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Aimee Parker is moving to Florida to marry her American fiance. Her parents Lynn and Dave have decided to buy a place in Orlando to provide the pair with their first house and offer them the option of a holiday home. Laura Hamilton shows Lynn and Aimee five properties for their £97,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Robert and Sue Booth have fallen in love with Spain on holiday over the years and have now decided to take the plunge and buy a place of their own in the Mar Menor area of the Costa Calida. For their budget of £60,000 they are determined to get a sea view and enough space for Robert to barbecue to his heart's content. Presenter and property expert Jasmine Harman accepts the challenge of finding some options that fit the bill

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Medical insurance boss Zac Kwintner hosts the first dinner party in Gloucestershire, making a traditional Jewish chicken soup, steak fondue and a rich chocolate orange tart. However, handing over cooking duties to his house staff does not go down well with the guests - a mature student, a travel agent, a web designer and a council worker

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mature student Gerry Hill hosts the second party in Gloucestershire, and hopes to spice up the competition with an Egyptian-themed feast. However, his ambitious menu prompts mixed reactions from the guests, and things go from bad to worse when dinner-table banter turns to insults, and one of the diners is forced to go home early

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Travel agent Kayleigh Hunt hosts the third dinner party in Gloucestershire, but her Moroccan-themed menu fails to impress the diners when she forgets to cook the main course. With all her guests hungry, she resorts to dressing up in her favourite outfits to keep them entertained

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Web designer Marc Harris hosts the penultimate dinner party in Gloucestershire. He is confident his Spanish menu will win over his fellow diners and is determined to put a halt to Zac's rude behaviour, but his plans go downhill when he makes a mess of his starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Council worker Ameena Cott hosts the final dinner party in Gloucestershire, and hopes to impress with a glamorous evening, which includes colour co-ordinating her dress to match her dog's outfit and making a birdcage centrepiece from a melon. She also tries to win her guests' affections with electric pulse-pad treatment and strawberry face masks, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Guest-house owners in Spain hope their music event will not attract the local police. In France, a motorhome rental business deals with damaged vehicles and the owners of a holiday village in Portugal deal with an unfortunate leak

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Alison and her daughter Paula are looking for a holiday home that feels traditionally Spanish. Presenter Jasmine Harman shows them five properties around Velez-Malaga for their budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ex-police officer Steve McGibbon is looking for the perfect holiday home in Fuerteventura where he can spend quality time with his daughter Madison. With his stepmother Sandra on hand for advice and five options lined up by property expert Ben Hillman for his budget of up to £120,000, he hopes his long list of exacting requirements will be met

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at some of their favourite properties from the show. They begin in Cullercoats, on North Tyneside, where Mark and Suze Drummond have emotional ties to their Victorian townhouse - special memories that are making it difficult for Suzie to consider leaving. In Rushden, Northamptonshire, Susan and John Antoniou-Bailey are torn over their unique five-bedroom home. Susan loves its history and original features, but John has had enough of constantly moving between the disjointed, boxy rooms

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A rugby player is scanned for spinal damage following a collision during a match, and describes her struggles with mental health issues as she awaits the results. A teacher is knocked off his bicycle after receiving some bad news, while a man who broke two bones in his ankle after a fall is assisted by his dead wife's best friend

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman with brittle bone disease who is in agony after a fall - only to find themselves with two patients on their hands as her daughter collapses in front of them. A young man whose blood sugar levels are so high is in danger of slipping into a diabetic coma, while a middle-aged man with a history of heart problems refuses to go to hospital

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Daisy May Cooper take on guest team captain Richard Ayoade and Ivo Graham. Adam Buxton is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, and Joe Wilkinson joins Rachel Riley at the numbers board

programme.title: Kathy Burke: Money Talks
programme.desc: Part two of two. Kathy explores the idea of escaping poverty through hard work, and considers the unseen obstacles that make this kind of social change difficult. She visits one of the most deprived towns in Britain and meets a local man trying to build community spirit, and discovers a community in Somerset for people who have rejected capitalism

programme.title: Can I Improve My Memory?
programme.desc: Memory techniques and hacks are employed to help celebrities learn as much as they can about a subject that they know absolutely nothing about. In this first programme, boxing champion Chris Eubank is tasked with memorising hundreds of facts about Jurassic dinosaurs, Strictly Come Dancing legend Len Goodman is given '90s American hip-hop to master, Love Island winner Amber Gill is assigned British birds, Naked Attraction presenter Anna Richardson is tasked with the solar system, while actress Nina Wadia must memorise the human skeleton. Hosted by Sandi Toksvig

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits professional deep-sea diver Adrian Corrigall and his wife Megan, who planned to build their new family home in rural East Sussex almost entirely out of concrete, with construction involving cutting-edge technologies conceived in Switzerland and never used to build a house before. With both the schedule and the budget under strain, Adrian was forced to resume work as a North Sea diver, leaving Megan juggling this messy and challenging build, all the while looking after three young children. By 2018, water leaks were still to be addressed, the majority of the spaces were raw and unfinished, and the family were still a long way away from moving into their concrete dream. Two and a half years later, with the house now fully complete, Kevin returns to see what living in a cutting-edge concrete bunker is really like

programme.title: Scotland's Coastal Railways with Julie Walters
programme.desc: The actress travels the beautiful coastal railways of Scotland, and meets the vibrant characters who live and work along its shoreline. In North Berwick she chats to Jane McMinn, IT consultant-turned-master mariner and lobster breeder. Other destinations include Edinburgh, where Julie discovers the intriguing connections between the railway and the famous Balmoral Hotel's Palm Court and Clock Tower

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Sophie, a privileged woman who loves cash rather than kids, is sent to stay with Pete, Mandy and five youngsters. She also has to help Pete in his job, working with children

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: The opening night of Dave and Tony's Mexican restaurant looks like being a washout when the rain pours down - and the weather doesn't exactly help mother-and-daughter bar owners Lisa and Tia when they advertise a Friday night barbecue. Dog rescuer Linda is worried about sick pup Donny, while Sheffield retirees Phil and Jackie - known for their colourful, matching outfits - scour the charity shops for more crazy clothing bargains

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: A chance to catch up with some of the families from series two and three, revealing what happened when the cameras stopped rolling. For all three pairs, it turns out the experiment has drawn them closer together - most now see each other almost every day and are the closest of friends, including some of the children. This documentary looks back at the most moving and amusing moments of their life swaps and also finds out where they are now

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: It is nurse Jade's final shift in Barnsley Hospital's casualty department and auxiliary nurse Mike is determined to give her a good send-off. In paediatrics, registrar Dr Nick Mani is seeing a nine-month-old boy who has a very high temperature, while physiotherapist Jovan helps a 90-year-old woman who banged her head in the hospital restaurant

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers are led on a chase through Bradford as they pursue a car stolen in Manchester by teenagers, while burglars who have been targeting pensioners are spotted in Halifax. Meanwhile in North Yorkshire, members of the road crime team have their hands full tracking thieves operating in a convoy of cars who steal from builders' vans in hotel and pub car parks. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers have their hands full over the festive period as party-going drunks end up getting behind the wheel, while the stresses of surviving Christmas lead to late night argy-bargy and screaming matches. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers are forced to exercise caution when they stop an uninsured driver who is known to have a violent past, while Jon Peacock and police dog Brad are on the hunt for suspected burglars. Sarah Capes gets a whiff of something illegal, Mike Templeman pulls over a white van with rather too many faults and one unlucky driver discovers that there is no fooling Dan Brigginshaw

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The hunt for a suspected burglar takes an unexpected turn, a late-night stop reveals a bag of drugs, Jon Peacock has a tussle with a fallen tree and Barry Peach deals with a case of some very hot dogs locked inside a car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan Brigginshaw is in hot pursuit of a two-wheeled tearaway, a suspected drunk driver nearly causes a calamity, and Mark has to turn detective at a three-car collision. Meanwhile, Sarah has a communication meltdown with a Mercedes driver

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall checks up on a 13 stone Newfoundland, whose health is in danger due to his weight - but who refuses to exercise unless he has been bribed with treats. Other pets on his list are a Great Dane with a social media following who makes his owners' lives unbearable and a dog so spoiled she even has her own car, but who has a serious dislike of children

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Levi is shaken to find a toy train on the doorstep. It is an exciting day for Paul as Leo arrives from New York

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Christian convinces Tori to talk to him, but Tori still does not understand his obsession with his patient. Emmett and Bella focus on the finishing touches to their photographs

programme.title: World's
programme.desc: The most frightening happenings and extreme stunts ever caught on camera, focusing on hair-raising aviation incidents, from emergency landings to hijackings, featuring testimonies from those who have lived to tell the tale. Including a remarkable touchdown at Warsaw Chopin Airport in 2011, the hijacking of Ethiopian Airlines Flight 961 in 1996, and a pilot who resorts to bouncing his passenger plane along a runway in an attempt to dislodge the jammed landing gear. Plus, British tourists have a brush with disaster on a balloon ride in Egypt and an aerobatic helicopter pilot narrowly escapes death

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Harry and Meghan vs the Monarchy
programme.desc: A look at the rift between Duke and Duchess of Sussex and the royal family, with both sides now engaged in a war of words that threatens to plunge the monarchy into yet more infighting and controversy

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend (2006)
programme.desc: Ordinary New Yorker Matt starts dating a woman he meets on the subway, unaware she is the superhero G-Girl. When he breaks up with the insecure crimefighter, she is outraged and uses her superpowers to make his life a misery. Meanwhile, her arch-enemy sees Matt as a potential ally in defeating G-Girl once and for all. Fantasy comedy, starring Uma Thurman, Luke Wilson and Eddie Izzard

programme.title: Here Come the Gypsies!
programme.desc: Romany Gypsy Lee Hughes devises a plan to expand his business by tapping into a lucrative market - treating racehorses. Meanwhile, Lavinia is preparing her daughter Valentina for a glamorous occasion, and Diamond Jackson visits graveyards as he searches for the perfect final resting place in light of his cancer diagnosis

programme.title: Extreme Fare Dodgers
programme.desc: With special access to Transport for London's revenue protection teams, this documentary tells the stories of frontline enforcement officers and undercover investigators fighting back against passengers dodging fares across the English capital ever day

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: The documentary explores the lives of straight sex workers who have turned their heterosexual predilections upside down to perform in gay roles for money. A cammer and porn star reveal what it takes to sell sex to fellow performers of the same gender, despite being straight in their private lives

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Jacob is the 19-year-old student son of millionaires, whose Chelsea flat was a gift from his parents. He goes to live with a cash-strapped couple in Manchester and their three children, and discovers that their weekly food budget matches one of his restaurant meals

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Katie-Louise, who runs a buy-and-sell website for ex-pats, is on a mission to persuade businesses to donate for a charity auction to play out live on the radio. Meanwhile, Geoff, who has become the very first Mr Whippy of Benidorm, having bought a van and fitted it out with a soft ice cream machine, faces a potentially terminal problem when his generator blows up

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: The Hogans and Bucks swap homes and budgets for the week at Christmas time - and although they live only 13 miles apart, their financial circumstances differ greatly. Noel and Lisa Hogan live in a five-bedroom house in Farnham with daughters Aysha and Amber, and thanks to ex-policeman Noel's private investigation company, they have a weekly budget of £3,336. Meanwhile, Tanya Buck lives in a Basingstoke council house with her three kids. She owns a cleaning company and after bills is left with £140 to live on. How will they manage living each other's lives for a week?

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Documentary filmed inside Barnsley casualty department. Paramedics call to say they are rushing in a critically ill one-day-old baby, a road worker is brought in after having his foot run over by a mini-digger and a woman seeks treatment following a surprising reaction to a beauty treatment. Sister Jane meets one of her heroes when Barnsley cricketing legend Dickie Bird arrives for a follow-up appointment

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Sgt Matt heads a team in pursuit of a teenage driver transporting stolen goods in a 7.5-ton truck, with the desperate youth ramming three police cars, almost running over an officer, and driving the wrong way up a dual carriageway before abandoning the vehicle and running off

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: An edition focusing on high-speed pursuits, revealing the judgement calls officers must make while weighing the dangers against the chances of capturing their suspects. On the M1, Karl hits speeds of 155mph to intercept a getaway car used by a gang of suspected thieves, but as he waits for other units to arrive his cover is blown and the target vehicle makes a run for it

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Martyn finds himself in the firing line when a suspect lashes out, Dan is given the runaround by an uninsured driver and Jon deals with a shoplifter who has been caught by members of the public. Finally, Mike meets a pair of very hungry late-night speeders

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Cameras follow a high-speed police interception unit at work in Durham and Cleveland, including Jack Hamilton dealing with a roadside dispute that has spiralled out of control, and a stand-off between armed officers and a man wielding a knife. Plus, officers combine forces to stop a stolen 4x4, while Kev Salter and Steve Brant tackle a runaway stolen van

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The high-speed police interception unit opens the door of a drug farm and assists with an emergency landing at Durham Tees Valley Airport. Plus, Jimmy Grieves catches a thief in the act and Darren Cawthorne deals with a driver who is causing problems

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall comes to the aid of three generations of the same family whose harmonious existence is being disrupted by a running feud between two of their dogs. Plus, a Border Collie's obsession with mirrors is becoming worrying, and a Chinese Crested will not let any man near his owner

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: After an unfortunate slip of the tongue, Nicolette gets ahead of Pierce to tell Chloe and David. Levi's boss looks in on his attackers, but only makes matters worse

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: The model party at Nikau's house is off to a flying start, but he is feeling out of place among the beautiful strangers. Dean returns from his trip to see his son

programme.title: Now That's Funny!
programme.desc: A collection of internet-sourced videos with a family friendly hook, featuring laugh-out-loud unexpected personal moments now being shared with the world

programme.title: Jackie Chan's The Forbidden Kingdom (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager obsessed with kung fu movies is sent back in time to ancient China, where he joins the battle to free the imprisoned Monkey King. The only problem is he has no martial arts skills of his own, and will need the assistance of two legendary warriors to become the hero he needs to be. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li and Jackie Chan

programme.title: And Proud
programme.desc: Documentary about petty thieves making a living by picking pockets and snatching valuables in the street, including 34-year-old Rob Nightingale, who has been active for the past five years and claims he has stolen valuables worth around £100,000 in the space of 12 months. The film also shows Romanian gangs operating in Liverpool and London and learns the tricks of their trade, as well as following the money back to their home country to discover what the ill-gotten gains are spent on

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: A bass player has a lump on his forehead that gives him a perpetual headache. Dr Emma operates on a chest cyst, and Dr Adil debates if he can remove a keloid from a patient's ear

programme.title: Drunk Tank Hangover
programme.desc: Cameras inside a Liverpool-based alcohol recovery bus focus on the inebriated during the four biggest party weekends of the year

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A woman collapses unexpectedly during a day out with her family to an adventure park, and is left unable to move or walk. The trauma team leader diagnoses a bleed on her brain that requires urgent surgery. A neurosurgeon attempts to drain the build-up of fluid in her brain. A motorist suffers a cardiac arrest behind the wheel, caused by a large clot in an artery, and a van driver is airlifted to hospital after a major traffic collision

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A toddler is rushed in with suspected sepsis, a life-threatening condition that attacks the organs, and a large team of specialists administer high-strength antibiotics. Elsewhere, advanced nurse practitioner Cheryl is looking after 57-year-old Michael, who has come in with severe abdominal pain, and an 87-year-old woman is rushed in after being knocked over by a car

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Wealthy university student Fatima learns how to budget when she moves in with Nicky, a single mum and youth worker who is struggling to make ends meet

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Another glimpse into the lives of expats who have left the UK for a new life in the Spanish sun. Cabaret star Mark - who appears on stage as Ruby Rox - films a video to play as part of his show, and sisters Vina and Nilam launch a business selling spice kits so expats can make their own curries. Tattoo artists Blane and Mark are in need of more customers, while retiree and metal detector enthusiast Stan spends his evenings searching the beaches for small change

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Series in which two families exchange holidays to see if money can buy happiness. A family from Bristol, who earn enough to be categorised in the wealthiest one per cent in Britain, trade their safari trip in Zambia for a stay in a B&B on a windswept Isle of Wight, with a family of six from Scunthorpe whose weekly income is roughly £130

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey and Sister Benita Wainwright treat Phil, who has the rare condition aortic dissection, while Dr Humphrey also tries to put a man's dislocated shoulder into place. Consultant Dr Bharath Reddy and junior Dr George Kay are on standby to treat 14-month-old Heaven, who is rushed in with breathing problems, while volunteer Jane keeps the team and patients fed and watered

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: After receiving reports that a lorry driver has almost struck a road worker on the M1, officers race to intercept a seven-and-a-half-ton truck, with Sgt Scott Riley deploying a stinger to bring the vehicle to a standstill. PC Chris Ryan receives a police camera alert that the driver in the car in front of him may under the influence of drugs, while Sgt Steve Hughes and his team investigate a crash in which a car hit a wall

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshire's finest face a series of issues with motorcyclists - with one evading them for over an hour in a high-speed chase

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Kev Salter and Ian Squire hunt for a man roaming the late-night streets with a machete, while the driver of a Ford Fiesta takes a pursuit off-road. Elsewhere, an uninsured boy racer takes his mum's car out for a spin with his mates, but leaves a trail of destruction in his wake, and a call comes in about a sharpshooter who is drunk and looking for a fight

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Damien Stevens draws his stun gun on an aggressive driver, while the hunt for a suspected armed robber turns up a nasty surprise for dog handler Jimmy Grieves. Paul Jackson grapples with a man armed with a machete, and officers get kitted up to raid the home of a suspected cannabis grower

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The series exploring the work of the North-East's high-speed police interception unit continues as Damo Stevens hunts down a heroin dealer, and Jacko rushes to a critical car crash. The interceptors are also called to investigate some potentially hazardous goods, and Kev makes an intriguing discovery in an airing cupboard. Plus, a young driver makes a mistake she may come to regret

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall's casebook starts with a broken bond between two best friends. Cairn terrier Ted has turned on his owner Mike after having a stroke and now Mike can't even cross his front room without Ted attacking him. Can Graeme help them pave the way back to friendship? There's a little girl's best friend, who is perfect at home, but a nightmare in the neighbourhood, leaving mum Jess so stressed out with his bad behaviour that if things don't change, she wants to rehome him

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Leo invites Chloe to visit the vineyard he is buying. Pierce and Hendrix bond as Mr Greyson prepares to leave for Sydney

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin returns home after his overdose episode, but his attitude is still terrible. Mac gets a reality check after a video of her is posted online, and John secretly contacts Susie

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: New Saydo Park arrivals Carole and Phyllis already love life in Spain but they want to experience more of the community spirit, so they sign up for fellow resident Margaret's mystery tour. Where will it take them? Tree surgeon Rocky faces danger on a daily basis as he tends to the high branches of the Costa del Sol, while young magician Dean faces the first night of a residency at the Chamber of Secrets theatre

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Doctors treat Craig, a window-fitter who has fallen from a ladder and has been knocked unconscious. He has a huge gash to the back on his head, but the medical staff are concerned he may have also seriously injured his neck and spine. Meanwhile, Advanced Nurse Practitioner Dave Sagol meets 61-year-old June, who has been rushed into the hospital with swollen legs and having difficulty breathing

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Dr Adil gets a surprise while operating on a lipoma, and a patient develops large lumps called keloids on both her ears as a result of getting her ears pierced

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Helen has an aneurysm in her brain that could burst at any time and lead to her death within minutes. For doctor Sanjeev Nayak there are no second chances as he embarks on an extraordinary operation to save his patient. Michael's life is also on a knife edge. After collapsing with a cardiac arrest, he was saved by a neighbour giving him CPR. But now the trauma doctors face a double battle - they must quickly assess his head injury and also remove a clot in his artery that is destroying his heart

programme.title: Shopping for a New Penis
programme.desc: Documentary following the story of theatre performer Richard from London, whose entire penis was surgically removed due to an aggressive form of penile cancer. Richard is still coming to terms with the physical and emotional impact of this ordeal on his everyday life and relationships, but with a candid sense of humour, he is confronting his situation head-on - sharing his story as a warning to others about a disease on the increase

programme.title: Eating Ourselves to Death
programme.desc: Documentary following three morbidly obese British people as they discuss the problems they face. For Darren - a 40-stone man who consumes more than 11,000 calories per day - his weight is now a matter of life or death, leading to serious heart complications. Mother-of-two Alice has struggled with her weight for years and tips the scales at 35 stone, while Alex's life has been destroyed by his food addiction

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: Real life cases of people murdered by their own partners, beginning with a controlling taxi driver who reacted violently at the prospect of his relationship ending

programme.desc: The amateur sleuth investigates the murder of a tennis player's boyfriend, who was killed by a bomb planted in the sportswoman's car. Starring Angela Lansbury, Linda Hamilton and Bryan Cranston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva visit Paris to escort Nora Williams, the key witness in an embezzlement case, back to America - but on the return flight they realise an assassin has boarded the plane with them, determined to ensure she never reaches home soil to testify. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva track a suspected terrorist to a warehouse, where they find traces of radioactive metal - together with evidence suggesting a nuclear attack is being planned on Washington, DC. Unfortunately, news of the threat leaks out to the public, triggering widespread panic. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of war veteran Greg Tanner, whose body was discovered in a Hudson University car park. Clues lead the duo to law professor Kevin Franklin, a former employee of the Department of Justice, and the picture gets clearer as Franklin's memos from the Bush Administration are leaked as the case goes to court. The first episode in the final season of the crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto, Anthony Anderson and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant student is found murdered, and detectives Briscoe and Curtis discover she was strangled to death before being stabbed by the killer in an effort to make the attack seem like the random act of a psychopath. A mathematics professor soon comes under suspicion as eyewitnesses allege he was close to the crime scene on the night in question

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. A shootout between a motorist and the police leads to the discovery of a body in a car boot - and puts the detectives on the trail of a money-laundering operation run by Russian gangsters. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy woman is found dead in her apartment, but Lupo and Bernard are quick to dismiss the theory that the killer sought her money. Evidence suggests she was mixing with dangerous figures, among them a cartel, after suitcases filled with cash and drugs are found in the victim's portfolio of properties

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Green and Briscoe search for a gigolo suspected of killing an elderly rich woman and stealing a large amount of her jewellery, but as investigations progress, it becomes clear there is more to the murder than meets the eye. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Sanitation workers find the body of a teenage boy, and the investigation leads to a school bully who displays an enthusiastic interest in martial arts. As the case progresses, the team discovers the youngster's father had bought the murder weapon, and attempts a risky gamble to bring the killer to justice

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva track a suspected terrorist to a warehouse, where they find traces of radioactive metal - together with evidence suggesting a nuclear attack is being planned on Washington, DC. Unfortunately, news of the threat leaks out to the public, triggering widespread panic. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Iraq war veteran Damon Werth asks Gibbs and the team to investigate the death of another former marine, who was murdered while working as a lorry driver, so Ziva hits the road to catch the killer. Joe Spano and Paul Telfer guest star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a Navy captain is killed in a robbery that went badly wrong, Gibbs' former mother-in-law surfaces as a witness in the investigation, and it transpires the victim had ties to a drug cartel that murdered the agent's first wife Shannon and daughter Kelly. Guest starring Gena Rowlands

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are hampered by a legal loophole while investigating a car bomb blast that killed three boys and injured their mother and elder brother. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team joins forces with detectives from the 47th Precinct to investigate the murder of a suspected sex offender, and Cragen becomes convinced witness and wealthy heiress Stephanie Mulroney is involved in the crime. When the real killer gives himself up, the Mulroney family demand an apology - but the clan may not be as innocent as they seem

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the sexual assault and suspicious death of an elderly woman, and question two teenagers who will only admit to breaking into the victim's apartment - until they confess somebody else was in there at the same time. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An acclaimed travel writer is found murdered with underwear stuffed in his mouth, and the unassuming boyfriend of his landlady comes under suspicion. Meanwhile, a precocious girl shocks Stabler with her knowledge of sex, and makes him uncomfortable at the thought that his own 14-year-old daughter is on the verge of entering the dating scene. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A college student is found dead having fallen down some stairs following a struggle, and it soon emerges that a campus basketball player had previously raped her. However, her parents and university officials had warned her off contacting the police - and it appears her attacker could be responsible for another heinous crime. Acclaimed drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: The Enemy Within

programme.title: The Enemy Within

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine is found with a gunshot wound six years after disappearing in Afghanistan, and the team discovers he vanished while carrying out an undercover operation. Gibbs suspects the wife could be hiding valuable information, but when a second woman challenges the soldier's identity and he subsequently dies in hospital, the team uncovers what really happened on that fateful mission

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A crime-scene investigator is killed in her apartment, and evidence initially leads Lupo and Bernard to her fiance - until a journalist is attacked by a taxi driver, and DNA evidence opens up an entirely new line of inquiry. Drama, starring Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order

McCoy, meanwhile, sets his sights on finding the killer - and the person who sold him the gun. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse E Martin and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A traffic collision that resulted in multiple fatalities is seemingly caused by a drink driver, but that theory is dismissed as Lupo and Bernard's investigation gets under way. The detectives discover a nasal spray that has been spiked to disorient its user and learn a pharmaceutical company worker was intending to disclose sensitive details about her employer - so the duo try to track down her boss

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is found strangled, leading Green and Briscoe to suspect a homeless man of the murder. Taken into custody, he refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering himself incapable of standing trial for murder. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A separated couple blame each other for concealing their missing baby, but the discovery of bloodstains in their apartment suggests another, more tragic explanation. programme.title: NCIS

Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Hard-hitting crime drama, starring Richard Belzer, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Police drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler suspects Benson may be in danger during an investigation into a stalker the officers believe to be responsible for the murder of an assistant district attorney. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: When an NSA analyst is killed in a car crash, Keaton and his team realise that she has stolen a piece of cloaking software that she intends to pass on to Tal. Shepherd decodes the encrypted message that Tal had left for the analyst, which reveals exactly where it was supposed to be delivered. Seizing their opportunity, Keaton asks Shepherd to go undercover, posing as the now dead analyst. Shepherd meets with Tal's contact, a young man called Braden. After a successful handover, the team learn that Tal is definitely in the US. In Washington DC, Tal meets with a mystery man who assures him that he can help with his FBI problem

However, they soon find themselves mixed up in a deadly case of jealousy and betrayal. Guest starring Ruthie Henshall and Tom Berenger

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Crime drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Vicar Ann Chapman, who runs four rural churches in the Dales, talks about her job, while Adrian Edmondson tries his hand at sheepdog training with 16-year-old shepherd Phillip Mellin and his mother Carol. Plus, fashion designer Izzy Lane and farmer Ernest Ayre try to track down a ram on the loose in their sheep sanctuary

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old shepherd Phillip Mellin goes to Skipton Auction Mart hoping to buy a dog he can train, while his mother Carol tries to sell her four-legged friend Jess. Tom Orde-Powlett sets up a boar park at Bolton Castle in Wensleydale, and Adrian Edmondson meets the Leyburn Band during preparations for the Hardraw Scar Brass Band Contest

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright finds out about the precautions taken when food is imported into Britain, seeing how health inspectors check consignments at the Port of Felixstowe - including testing products from Japan for radiation - and how sniffer dogs help ensure no illegal foodstuffs are brought into the country at Gatwick Airport. Chris Hollins meets an Exeter woman who ended up in intensive care suffering from E-coli after eating a bought sandwich and Ben Milligan travels to a family home in Holmfirth near Huddersfield that appears clean and tidy - but his bacteria tests still spring a few surprises

programme.title: Death at Broadcasting House (1934)
programme.desc: When an actor is murdered, Detective Inspector Gregory quickly discovers that the victim had many enemies. Drama, starring Jack Hawkins, Donald Wolfit and Ian Hunter

programme.title: Man Friday (1975)
programme.desc: Shipwrecked mariner Robinson Crusoe is overjoyed to discover he has a fellow castaway, a black islander whom he names Friday, and insists in treating as a servant and trying to convert to Western culture. Friday quickly grasps that Crusoe will never see him as an equal, and uses his cunning to turns the tables on the Englishman. Comedy, starring Peter O'Toole and Richard Roundtree

programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Lee, Bermondsey and Stratford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Year at Kew

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a sporting special of the game show. The contestants are former boxer Joe Calzaghe and 16-time world darts champion Phil Taylor, former England rugby union player Phil Vickery and England cricketer Ravi Bopara, 1966 World Cup legend Geoff Hurst and Paralympic cyclist Sarah Storey, and 2012 Team GB rowers Sophie Hosking and Helen Glover

programme.desc: We revisit the epic 2006 German Grand Prix at the Sachsenring. Marco Melandri, Nicky Hayden and Dani Pedrosa all had a shot at victory, but it was Valentino Rossi who snatched it

programme.title: MotoGP Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2006 Portugal Grand Prix in Estoril, one of the most dramatic races ever. Action-packed from the start, the race culminated in a thrilling three-way last lap battle

programme.title: Gallagher Premiership Rugby Highlights
programme.desc: The best of the latest action from round six of the Gallagher Premiership including Bath v Wasps, Sale Sharks v Worcester Warriors and Exeter Chiefs v Bristol Bears

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Blackburn host Newcastle in an Emirates FA Cup third round replay at Ewood Park. Matt Ritchie's late penalty spared the Premier League side's blushes when the two met in Newcastle

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Barnet look to continue their Emirates FA Cup run as they host Brentford in the fourth round. Barnet booked their place at this stage with a stunning upset at Sheffield United

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: AFC Wimbledon host West Ham United in the fourth round of The Emirates FA Cup at Kingsmeadow. These two met in the Carabao Cup earlier in the season when West Ham came out on top

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Manchester City look to strengthen their bid for an unprecedented quadruple as they meet Swansea in the Emirates FA Cup quarter-finals. Swansea are winless in the last 13 meetings

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Watford, runners-up in 1984, meet Wolves in the Emirates FA Cup semi-finals at Wembley. Nuno Espirito Santo's men saw-off Liverpool and Manchester United on route to the last four

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Relive the goal-laden 2018/19 Emirates FA Cup final between Manchester City, who were chasing a domestic treble, and Javi Gracia's Watford. City hadn't won the trophy since 2011

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: A collection of stories from The FA Cup. From the extra preliminary round all the way to the final, profiling the characters taking part in the world's oldest club competition

programme.title: MotoGP Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the epic 2007 Catalunya Grand Prix in Barcelona. Casey Stoner withstood pressure from Valentino Rossi and Dani Pedrosa in the closest race of the season

programme.desc: We revisit the 2008 USA Grand Prix at Laguna Seca. Race favourite Casey Stoner went wheel-to-wheel with Valentino Rossi in one of the greatest and most heart-stopping races ever

programme.title: MotoGP Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2008 Qatar Grand Prix at the Losail International Circuit, the first ever night race. Casey Stoner began his title defence, while James Toseland made his GP debut

programme.title: MotoGP Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2008 French Grand Prix at Le Mans which saw a rain-affected race dominated by the Yamaha trio of Valentino Rossi, Jorge Lorenzo and Colin Edwards

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Coverage of the 2020 Heads Up FA Cup Final as Arsenal and Chelsea meet at Wembley Stadium. The Gunners came out 2-1 winners when the two met in the 2017 FA Cup Final

programme.desc: England v Pakistan. Coverage of the final match in the three-match series, which takes place at Edgbaston. This series gives the home side the chance to win their sixth ODI series in a row against their opponents, a run that stretches back to 2006 when England lost 3-2 in Pakistan. The previous one-day series between the two sides saw England run out comfortable winners 4-0 back in 2019.

This series gives the home side the chance to win their sixth ODI series in a row against their opponents, a run that stretches back to 2006 when England lost 3-2 in Pakistan. The previous one-day series between the two sides saw England run out comfortable winners 4-0 back in 2019.

programme.title: Live British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: South Africa A v British & Irish Lions (Kick-off 7.00pm). Coverage of the Tour match from Cape Town Stadium, as the Lions build up to the three-test series in South Africa. This is the penultimate warm-up match for Warren Gatland's side as they prepare for a tough series against the world champions. The Lions don't have a fantastic record in South Africa, winning just four of their 13 previous tours.

programme.desc: Coverage of the first day of the Major taking place at Royal St. George's Golf Club in Sandwich, Kent.
